ABORT.description: Irrecoverable failure — do NOT proceed to envelope or preview. Stop immediately.

conditions.condition: HTTP response status is not 2xx
conditions.action: Stop. Do not process response. Set eligible_for_real_send=false.

conditions.condition: Request timeout > 10 seconds
conditions.action: Stop. Do not retry in this run. Log timeout as ABORT reason.

conditions.condition: Response body is not valid JSON
conditions.action: Stop. Do not attempt to parse. Log raw response snippet (no keys).

conditions.condition: Response JSON does not match expected schema (missing assetPositions or equivalent positions array)
conditions.action: Stop. Log schema mismatch details.

conditions.condition: Response missing assetPositions / equivalent positions array
conditions.action: Stop. No positions data to process.

conditions.condition: Target address response empty for ALL tracked addresses
conditions.action: Stop. No tracked address has any position data.

conditions.condition: Required position fields missing > 20% across all responses
conditions.action: Stop. Data quality too low to produce any meaningful signal.

conditions.condition: Numeric field parse failure for position_size / entry_price / mark_price / unrealized_pnl
conditions.action: Stop. Cannot validate position data without numeric values.

conditions.condition: Rate limit / anti-bot / blocked response detected
conditions.action: Stop. Do not retry. Log rate limit evidence.

conditions.condition: Any response requiring auth / API key / cookie
conditions.action: Stop. This source was planned as public/free. Auth requirement invalidates the plan.

conditions.condition: Any attempt to write production state
conditions.action: Stop. v112W is plan-only. Production state writes are forbidden.

DEGRADE_TO_MOCK.description: Partial data quality issues — can produce signals but with degraded confidence. Flag in envelope/preview.

conditions.condition: Partial tracked address failure, but success rate still >= 50%
conditions.action: Process successful addresses. Mark degraded addresses in metadata. Set stop_decision=DEGRADE_TO_MOCK.

conditions.condition: Address label missing or label confidence low
conditions.action: Use 'Unknown Whale' fallback. Set label_confidence=low. Flag in envelope.

conditions.condition: liquidation_price missing but other core fields complete
conditions.action: Set liquidation_price=null. Note in card: '清算价格不可用'.

conditions.condition: previous_position_size unavailable
conditions.action: Skip position_delta calculation. Mark alert_type based on current position only.

conditions.condition: position_delta cannot be computed (no history or inconsistent state)
conditions.action: Set position_delta_usd=0, position_delta_direction='unknown'. Note in card.

conditions.condition: Timestamp freshness uncertain (response timestamp missing or > 5 min old)
conditions.action: Generate safe local timestamp. Note 'timestamp may be approximate' in card.

conditions.condition: Position changed between local state and live response (race condition)
conditions.action: Use live response data. Flag 'position may have changed since last observation'.

conditions.condition: Address label stale or unknown (label not updated > 30 days)
conditions.action: Use existing label but mark confidence as low. Flag in envelope metadata.

CONTINUE.description: All quality gates passed — produce v112F-compatible whale event. eligible_for_real_send remains false.

conditions.condition: All required fields present for at least one tracked address
conditions.action: Proceed to adapter stage.

conditions.condition: At least one tracked address returns active position
conditions.action: Process positions for that address.

conditions.condition: Numeric fields parse successfully (position_size, entry_price, mark_price, pnl)
conditions.action: Proceed with normalized values.

conditions.condition: Timestamp / observed_at present or safely generated
conditions.action: Use response timestamp or generate safe local timestamp.

conditions.condition: Address label confidence high, or fallback to 'Unknown Whale' acceptable
conditions.action: Use label as-is or apply Unknown Whale fallback.

conditions.condition: Adapter can produce v112F-compatible whale event
conditions.action: Transform live response to v112F-compatible format.

conditions.condition: Envelope can remain eligible_for_real_send=false
conditions.action: Create envelope with eligible_for_real_send=false. Do NOT mark as real_send ready.

conditions.condition: No ABORT condition triggered AND no DEGRADE_TO_MOCK condition triggered
conditions.action: CONTINUE is the default when all checks pass cleanly.

decision_flow.logic: Check ABORT first. If any ABORT condition matches, stop immediately. Then check DEGRADE_TO_MOCK. If any DEGRADE condition matches, proceed with degraded quality flags. Otherwise CONTINUE.
decision_flow.fallback: If neither CONTINUE nor DEGRADE is reached, default to ABORT (fail-safe).
